title: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ho Chi Minh City is a city in Ho Chi Minh City with a population of 9,320,000. Vietnam’s largest city and economic engine, formerly Saigon, offering a dynamic mix of modern skyscrapers, French colonial architecture, and one of Southeast Asia’s most vibrant food scenes.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
